Student Name: David Chen
Period: 1
Date: 2/20/2025
Assignment: Solving Equations Worksheet

Questions

[GRAIDER:QUESTION:1]
1) 3x + 7 = 22 (5 pts)
3x = 15
x = 5

[GRAIDER:QUESTION:2]
2) 2(x - 4) = 10 (5 pts)
2x - 8 = 10
2x = 18
x = 9

[GRAIDER:QUESTION:3]
3) 5x - 3 = 2x + 12 (5 pts)
3x = 15
x = 5

[GRAIDER:QUESTION:4]
4) x/4 + 6 = 11 (5 pts)
x/4 = 5
x = 20

[GRAIDER:QUESTION:5]
5) -2x + 8 = 3x - 7 (5 pts)
-5x = -15
x = 3

[GRAIDER:QUESTION:6]
6) 4(2x + 1) = 36 (5 pts)
8x + 4 = 36
8x = 32
x = 4

[GRAIDER:QUESTION:7]
7) 3x/5 = 9 (5 pts)
3x = 45
x = 15

[GRAIDER:QUESTION:8]
8) 7 - x = 2x + 1 (5 pts)
6 = 3x
x = 2

[GRAIDER:QUESTION:9]
9) Sarah has 3 times as many stickers as Tom. Together they have 48 stickers. How many does each person have? (10 pts)
Let x = Tom's stickers
3x + x = 48
4x = 48
x = 12
Tom has 12, Sarah has 36

[GRAIDER:QUESTION:10]
10) A rectangle's length is 5 more than its width. The perimeter is 42 cm. Find the dimensions. (10 pts)
Let w = width
2(w + 5) + 2w = 42
2w + 10 + 2w = 42
4w = 32
w = 8
Width = 8 cm, Length = 13 cm

GRAIDER_TABLE_V1
